evals.prompt: I want to start contributing to vllm. Can you check what issues came up recently that I could pick up? I'm a staff eng working on inference infra.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown report file with top recommendations, difficulty scores, and a full issue summary table for vllm-project/vllm

evals.prompt: Scout kubernetes/kubernetes for contribution opportunities from the last 24 hours. Save the report to my current directory.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown report for kubernetes/kubernetes with scored issues, claimed/PR status, and top picks

evals.prompt: hey can you check what's new on langchain-ai/langchain? looking for something I can fix this weekend, ideally something not too hard. I mostly work on LLM serving infra
evals.expected_output: A Markdown report for langchain-ai/langchain with recommendations biased toward lower-difficulty issues relevant to LLM/serving infrastructure
